modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Upload failed error when editing or opening documents in Office

full_description_text:  
I was trying to open and edit a document in Microsoft Office, and I kept getting this really frustrating error message. It said something like "Upload Failed - We're sorry, someone updated the server copy and it's not possible to upload your changes now." I mean, I just wanted to make some changes, but instead, I was met with this confusing message about conflicts and uploads. It also mentioned that my document hasn't been uploaded to the server, which is just so annoying because I thought everything was saved properly!
